steps.title: Locate the helpful feature
steps.content: The passage says the bark has a unique structure that makes latex easy to collect; its inner tubes let latex flow out when cut.

steps.title: Eliminate unsupported claims
steps.content: B states that the bark's unique structure helps collect latex. A adds unsupported rubber quality, C adds unsupported climate range, and D adds unsupported rarity. The answer is B.
